ju”

nu”

lo”

nation - bh
every - ma
cities - lo
part - nu
range - ga
making - de
try - va
peace - bu

question:
Study the following arrangement carefully and
answer the questions given below. One of the
codes in the underlined statement is incorrect.
In a certain coded language some statements
are coded as follows:
 
TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517
822
STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590
517 407
CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded
as 407 591 ??? 822 667
BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as
591 719 ]]] 407 822
 
Which among the following is the incorrect code
in the underlined statement?
explanation:
It is given that,
TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517
822 ..................................(I)
STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590
517 407 ................................(II)
CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded
as 407 591 ??? 822 667........(III)
BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as
591 719 ]]] 407 822.............(IV)
From I and II, BOX == 517.
From II, III and IV, STAND == 407.
From I, III and IV, CHAIR == 822.
From I and IV, TABLE == 719.
From I, DESK == 448.
From III and IV, BOARD == 591.
From IV, DECK == ]]]
From II, STOOL SOFA == 198 590 (Here, one of
the codes is incorrect.)
From III, STOOL COVER == ??? 667
Here, either 590 or 198 is the incorrect code.

question:
Study the following arrangement carefully and
answer the questions given below. One of the
codes in the underlined statement is incorrect.
In a certain coded language some statements
are coded as follows:
 
TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517
822
explanation:
It is given that,
TABLE CHAIR DESK BOX is coded as 719 448 517
822 ..................................(I)
STAND BOX STOOL SOFA is coded as 198 590
517 407 ................................(II)
CHAIR STOOL STAND BOARD COVER is coded
as 407 591 ??? 822 667........(III)
BOARD STAND TABLE CHAIR DECK is coded as
591 719 ]]] 407 822.............(IV)
From I and II, BOX == 517.
From II, III and IV, STAND == 407.
From I, III and IV, CHAIR == 822.
From I and IV, TABLE == 719.
From I, DESK == 448.
From III and IV, BOARD == 591.
From IV, DECK == ]]]
From II, STOOL SOFA == 198 590 (Here, one of
the codes is incorrect.)
From III, STOOL COVER == ??? 667
Here, '728' is the only code which can replace
']]]''. As,
a) 407 == STAND
b) 822 == CHAIR
c) 448 == DESK
d) 517 == BOX
